created_for: GS LinkOps AI resource database building
language_strategy: English-first master database, English technical fields, Chinese only for internal reasoning or bilingual negotiation notes.

records.name: CelesTrak NORAD GP Element Sets
useful_for: Communications, GNSS, Earth resources, Planet, Spire, Starlink, OneWeb groups
CSV / JSON / OMM XML / OMM KVN formats
records.confidence_level: High for public orbit/catalogue metadata; not sufficient for private downlink configuration
records.next_action: Use as first satellite/orbit data source and build satellite profile importer later.

records.name: UCS Satellite Database
useful_for: mass, power, launch date, expected lifetime
records.confidence_level: Useful for open-source satellite context; database data current through 2023-05-01 and updates are paused
records.next_action: Use as historical/context supplement, not sole current source.

records.name: AWS Ground Station How It Works
records.confidence_level: High for cloud GSaaS workflow reference; not a source for all third-party station details
missing_fields: partner station commercial terms outside AWS
records.next_action: Use as architecture benchmark for our Mission Profile and Contact Scheduling model.

records.name: Leaf Space Leaf Line
useful_for: global antenna count and location count
payload file transfer examples such as S3 bucket
records.confidence_level: High for public Leaf Line service model; insufficient for individual antenna RF/baseband fingerprint
records.next_action: Use as public GSaaS benchmark and compare with GS LinkOps AI dispatch platform positioning.

records.name: SatNOGS Network
records.confidence_level: Useful for open network concepts and metadata; not equivalent to commercial X-band payload downlink capability
records.next_action: Use for open metadata and interface inspiration, not as commercial station availability source.

records.name: AWS Ground Station Contact Scheduling and Mission Profile Model
useful_for: mission profile as reusable technical configuration
records.confidence_level: High for architecture and workflow vocabulary because it is official AWS documentation; not a per-antenna engineering disclosure.
missing_fields: exact antenna coordinates beyond public location abstraction
records.next_action: Adopt AWS-style objects: satellite_onboarding, mission_profile, contact_request, contact_status and dataflow_pair as core GS LinkOps AI database entities.

records.name: Svalbard Satellite Station / SvalSat public reference
useful_for: C / L / S / X / K band public capability reference
S-band TT&C and X-band high-speed data downlink pattern
network operation center and redundancy concept
records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful public reference for station model and polar coverage logic; exact current engineering/commercial details require KSAT or official contract confirmation.
records.next_action: Use as benchmark for polar-station data model. Add official KSAT pages or partner documents when accessible.

records.name: Troll Satellite Station / TrollSat public reference
useful_for: 7.3 m LEO antenna public capability reference
remote station operations and backhaul risk reference
records.confidence_level: Medium. Good public reference for polar coverage and station abstraction; not enough for commercial tasking or technical integration.
records.next_action: Store as a polar benchmark station and compare with Swedish/Arctic station resources.

records.name: SSC / Esrange Satellite Station public reference
useful_for: remote sensing and scientific mission data acquisition
pairing with Inuvik for increased polar coverage
records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful for public capability context; official SSC capability sheets are still needed for current commercial integration.
records.next_action: Add official SSC service pages and capability sheets in the next scan; use this as baseline public station profile.

records.name: ESA Ground Stations / ESTRACK public network reference
useful_for: station network map and station pages
station-specific pages for New Norcia, Cebreros, Malargue, Kiruna, Kourou, ESEC, Santa Maria
records.confidence_level: High for ESA-owned public station pages and institutional taxonomy; not a commercial GSaaS source.
records.next_action: Create station-specific records for Kiruna, Kourou, Santa Maria, New Norcia, Cebreros and Malargue after reviewing each ESA station page.

records.name: ESTRACK station capability public table reference
useful_for: augmented network operator references such as KSAT, SSC and Goonhilly
records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful summarized public matrix; validate against official ESA pages before operational use.
records.next_action: Use these fields to define the standard station_capability table schema, then replace public-summary values with official/source-confirmed values.

records.name: CCSDS Space Link Extension Services cross-support standard family
useful_for: return all frames / return channel frames / forward CLTU concepts
records.confidence_level: High as standards-family reference; individual implementation details still depend on station operator and mission system.
records.next_action: Add CCSDS SLE service types as optional adapter/interface fields for institutional and professional ground station profiles.

records.name: EarthSight: A Distributed Framework for Low-Latency Satellite Intelligence
useful_for: latency benchmark concept from first contact to delivery
records.confidence_level: Medium-high for research concept extraction; not an operational GSaaS capability sheet.
records.next_action: Use as future AI matching/priority-scoring inspiration, not as an immediate ground-station availability source.

next_batch_targets: SSC CONNECT official service pages and capability sheets
NASA Near Space Network / Deep Space Network pages
AWS Ground Station site capabilities page
